search.query: `sandfly_search_whitelist` | dedup whitelist_rule.id | eval whitelist_name=tostring('whitelist_rule.id') + " " + 'whitelist_rule.sandfly' | table whitelist_rule.id whitelist_name | rename whitelist_rule.id as whitelist_id | sort whitelist_id
`sandfly_search_whitelist` whitelist_rule.id=$tok_id$ | dedup whitelist_rule.id | eval is_active=if('whitelist_rule.active'=="true","Active","Inactive") | table is_active

`sandfly_search_whitelist` whitelist_rule.id=$tok_id$ | dedup whitelist_rule.id | eval whitelist_type=if('whitelist_rule.exclude_sandfly'=="true", "Disable Sandfly", "Match Rules") | table whitelist_type

`sandfly_search_whitelist` whitelist_rule.id=$tok_id$ | dedup whitelist_rule.id | eval num_host_ids=mvcount('whitelist_rule.host_ids{}') | fillnull value=0 num_host_ids | eval num_host_tags=mvcount('whitelist_rule.host_tags{}') | fillnull value=0 num_host_tags | eval scope=if(num_host_ids==0 AND num_host_tags==0, "None", "match") | eval scope=if(num_host_ids>0 AND num_host_tags>0, "Mixed", scope) | eval scope=if(num_host_ids>0 AND num_host_tags==0, "Match Host IDs", scope) | eval scope=if(num_host_ids==0 AND num_host_tags>0, "Match By Tags", scope) | eval scope=if('whitelist_rule.all_hosts'=="true", "All Hosts", scope) | table scope
`sandfly_search_whitelist` whitelist_rule.id=$tok_id$ | dedup whitelist_rule.id | table whitelist_rule.comment | rename whitelist_rule.comment as "Comment"

`sandfly_search_whitelist` whitelist_rule.id=$tok_id$ | dedup whitelist_rule.id | eval num_host_tags=mvcount('whitelist_rule.host_tags{}') | fillnull value=0 num_host_tags | search num_host_tags>0 | table num_host_tags

`sandfly_search_whitelist` whitelist_rule.id=$tok_id$ | dedup whitelist_rule.id | eval num_host_tags=mvcount('whitelist_rule.host_tags{}') | fillnull value=0 num_host_tags | search num_host_tags>0 | eval aaa_host_tag='whitelist_rule.host_tags{}' | mvexpand aaa_host_tag | map [ search `sandfly_search_hosts_summary` | dedup host_summary.host_id | eval aaa_tag="$$aaa_host_tag$$" | eval aaa_tag_found=if(isnull(mvfind('host_summary.tags{}', aaa_tag)), "false", "true") | search aaa_tag_found="true"] | table aaa_tag host_summary.hostname host_summary.last_seen_ip_addr host_summary.os_info_node host_summary.host_id | rename aaa_tag as "Tag" | rename host_summary.hostname as "Target Address" | rename host_summary.last_seen_ip_addr as "IP Address" | rename host_summary.os_info_node as "Hostname" | rename host_summary.host_id as "HostID"

`sandfly_search_whitelist` whitelist_rule.id=$tok_id$ | dedup whitelist_rule.id | eval num_host_ids=mvcount('whitelist_rule.host_ids{}') | fillnull value=0 num_host_ids | search num_host_ids>0 | table num_host_ids

`sandfly_search_whitelist` whitelist_rule.id=$tok_id$ | dedup whitelist_rule.id | eval num_host_ids=mvcount('whitelist_rule.host_ids{}') | fillnull value=0 num_host_ids | search num_host_ids>0 | eval aaa_host_id='whitelist_rule.host_ids{}' | mvexpand aaa_host_id | foreach whitelist_rule.host_info.* [ eval t_match = if(like("<<FIELD>>", "%" + aaa_host_id + "%"), "true", "false") | eval fieldnames=if(t_match == "true", mvappend(fieldnames,"<<FIELD>>"), fieldnames) | eval t_value=if(isnull('<<FIELD>>') or len('<<FIELD>>')==0, "foobar", '<<FIELD>>') | eval fieldvalues=if(t_match == "true", mvappend(fieldvalues,'<<FIELD>>'), fieldvalues)] ```| table aaa_host_id namematch fieldnames fielddata fieldvalues``` | eval t_hostname=mvindex(fieldvalues,mvfind(fieldnames,".*" + aaa_host_id + "\.hostname")) | eval t_ip_addr=mvindex(fieldvalues,mvfind(fieldnames,".*" + aaa_host_id + "\.last_seen_ip_addr")) | eval t_node_name=mvindex(fieldvalues,mvfind(fieldnames,".*" + aaa_host_id + "\.node_name")) | table t_hostname t_ip_addr t_node_name aaa_host_id | rename t_hostname as "Target Address" | rename t_ip_addr as "IP Address" | rename t_node_name as "Hostname" | rename aaa_host_id as "HostID"

`sandfly_search_whitelist` whitelist_rule.id=$tok_id$ | dedup whitelist_rule.id | eval num_rules=mvcount('whitelist_rule.rules{}') | fillnull value=0 num_rules | search num_rules > 0 | table num_rules

`sandfly_search_whitelist` whitelist_rule.id=$tok_id$ | dedup whitelist_rule.id | eval num_rules=mvcount('whitelist_rule.rules{}') | fillnull value=0 num_rules | search num_rules > 0 | table whitelist_rule.rule_op | rename whitelist_rule.rule_op as rule_op

`sandfly_search_whitelist` whitelist_rule.id=$tok_id$ | dedup whitelist_rule.id | eval num_rules=mvcount('whitelist_rule.rules{}') | fillnull value=0 num_rules | search num_rules > 0 | table whitelist_rule.rules{} | rename whitelist_rule.rules{} as "Rules"
